title: His People
writer: Isadore Bernstein, Alfred A. Cohn, Charles E. Whittaker
actors: Rudolph Schildkraut, Rosa Rosanova, Robert Gordon
plot: The two sons of a poor Russian-Jewish pushcart peddler on New York's Lower East Side are causing their father grief. As Morris and Sammy stray from traditions cherished by their parents, each generation learns to accept change to ...
